docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAY-02-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COUICH, JUAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VRIHEAS, NICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COUICH, JUAN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,075.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE BEDBUG INFESTATION IN DEFENDANTS UNIT LIKELY ORGINATED IN THAT UNIT AND WAS LIKELY CAUSED BY EXACERBATED BY THE CLUTTER ISSUE INSIDE. HOWEVER THE COURT CREDITS DEFENDANT'S EFFORTS TO BRING THE MATTER TO THE PROPERTY MANAGEMENTS ATTENTION & TO ASSIST WITH REMEDIATION. THEREFORE ONLY PARTIAL CONTRIBUTION TO THE EXTERMINATION COST IS ORDERED TO BE PAID BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF VRIHEAS, NICK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,091.00 FILED BY VRIHEAS, NICK AS TO DEFENDANT COUICH, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ROSA MARIA CAVALHO. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY VRIHEAS, NICK COUICH, JUAN
